symbols: fish — an ancient Christian symbol (ichthys) of Christ and the faithful, though here primarily a still-life subject
abundance of seafood — the bounty of creation and provision from the waters
bowl and vessels — domestic simplicity and the preparation of nourishment
leafy greens — freshness and the goodness of the earth's produce
description: A vibrant still life arrangement on a wooden table featuring an abundant display of fresh fish and seafood. Several whole fish of various species — including what appear to be mackerel, flatfish, and a spotted ray or skate — are spread across the surface alongside large seashells, leafy greens, and a grey ceramic bowl. A woven basket is visible at the back. The palette is rich with blues, silvers, warm ochres, and greens, rendered in bold, expressive brushwork characteristic of Kisling's modernist approach.
